health_conditions: finger amputation history (2004, middle finger tip)

benefits.description: Regained feeling/sensation in middle finger that had tip amputated in 2004. Described as 'crazy feeling' to have function return to normal after cycle.
General healing benefits described as 'so awesome' and effective for 'SO MANY different types of healing'

protocol_notes: Has shared previous experience with GHK-Cu on the subreddit. Benefits justify working through initial discomfort.
